title: fix_pipeline_next_decide_approach_response
description: Response schema for the fix_pipeline_next_decide_approach agent that decides the approach for fixing a pipeline.

decision.description: Use 'create_fix_on_new_mr' when confident a fix can be created and no merge_request_url is present. Use 'create_fix_on_existing_mr' when confident a fix can be created and a merge_request_url is present. Use 'add_comment' when not confident or unable to create a fix.
